Mid-Senior PHP Full Stack Developer

NextStep Systems On-site Full-time

We are seeking a talented Mid-Senior PHP Full Stack Developer to join our team. This is an exciting opportunity to work on cutting-edge projects and grow your career in a dynamic environment.

Requirements:

  • 5+ years of PHP development experience
  • Strong knowledge of Laravel framework
  • Experience with JavaScript and modern frontend frameworks
  • MySQL database design and optimization skills

Responsibilities:

  • Develop and maintain web applications using PHP and JavaScript
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define requirements
  • Write clean, maintainable code following best practices

Benefits:

  • Competitive salary ($100,000 - $140,000)
  • Health insurance
  • 401(k) matching
  • Flexible work hours

Qualifications:

  • Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field
  • Strong problem-solving skills
  • Excellent communication abilities
